message:
feat(core,conformance): strict policy bundle signed_fields + diff dedup

Harden PolicyBundle validation and diff output:

- PolicyBundle::validate() now enforces exact match of
  signature.signed_fields against POLICY_BUNDLE_SIGNED_FIELDS constant
  (rejects missing, extra, or reordered fields)
- diff_policy_bundles() deduplicates and sorts missing_objects via
  BTreeSet for deterministic diff output
- PolicyBundle_v1.schema.json: signed_fields array now uses fixed-size
  enum constraint (minItems/maxItems 10, uniqueItems, enum values)
- 3 new unit tests: rejects missing, extra, and reordered signed fields
- 2 new diff tests: missing_objects dedup/sort, golden snapshot of
  diff output including zone_policy transport changes and risk flags
- Integration test for incomplete signed_fields in policy_bundle_schema

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
